Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment And Donative Transfers To Care Custodian
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Continued To Dec-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ciaran O'Sullivan for (petitioners) Fusako Wakasa & Ellen Younger. Kevin Rodriguez for (trustee/respondent) Masaye Pat Hattori.

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that in regards to the petition to invalidate the trust amendment and extension was needed to complete mediation and the court extended the mediation completion date to December 12, 2014, and the status of mediation for December 16, 2014.
In regard to the Petition for Instructions: Mr. O'Sullivan stated that the first amendment removing his clients as beneficiaries was done under undue influence by the caregiver named in the amendment, that Ms. Hattori is using trust funds to litigate and requests an order prohibiting the use of trust funds or an appointment of an independent fiduciary. Mr. Rodriguez stated that the reply brief requests the suspension of the trustee but the petition does not, that the beneficiaries need to provide evidence that they can invalidate the trust, that the trustee has a duty to perform the terms of the trust including litigation and that the beneficiaries could bring an action against the trustee if it was deemed that the trustee used funds inaproriately. Mr. Rodriguez also stated that the petitioners do not substatiate their claim, Ms. Hattori was not a care custodian but was a long time friend, was not receiving pay and that the decedent intended for her to have everything. Mr. O'Sullivan stated that the petitioners are cousin and sister-in-law of the decedent. The court requested that Mr. Rodriguez submit a proposed order forthwith and took the Petition for instructions under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. Court Reporter: Judith A. DeAlba, #5709, 650-571-1473. (Reported)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Continued To Oct-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment And Donative Transfers To Care Custodian
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Continued To Oct-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ciarin O'Sullivan for Fusako Wakasa and Ellen Younger. Kevin Rodriguez for and with Pat Hattori (Respondent/Trustee).

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that his Client wants to propound some discovery. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 24, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by October 24, 2014. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendment and Donative Transfers to Care Custodian was continued to and the Parties are to return on October 28, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The Parties will work on informal discovery.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment And Donative Transfers To Care Custodian
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Continued To Jul-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
